extraction_notes: Complete extraction from 92-page Rev4 schematic. U-designators confirmed from schematic pages. PMU naming: SERA = Master PMU (U8100), SIMETRA = Slave PMU (U7700) per power aliases page 78.
WARNING: M1 (T8103) board. Different SoC and PMU configuration from M2 (A2681). USB-C port controllers are CD3217 (same as M2). Charger IC is U5200 area. SVR AON controller is on pages 25-26, NOT the same U-designator range as M2.

ics.description: Main System on Chip. PCPU, ECPU, GPU, Neural Engine, memory controller, I/O. BGA package with integrated LPDDR4X.

ics.function: SVR AON - 3V8 always-on switching voltage regulator
ics.description: Multi-phase buck converter producing PP3V8_AON from PPBUS_AON. 30A ICC MAX design, 1MHz. Phase drivers on page 26. Main power IC feeding both PMUs.
Slave Power Management Unit. Bucks: 0-14 (see aliases page 78 for SIMETRA BUCK assignments). LDOs: 1-20 plus switches SW1-7. Input: PP3V8_AON. SIMETRA naming from power aliases.
Master Power Management Unit. Bucks: 0-14 (see aliases page 78 for SERA BUCK assignments). LDOs, GPIO, ADC, 32K clock, charger reset. Input: PP3V8_AON. SERA naming from power aliases.
Main charger IC converting USB-C input to PPBUS_AON and managing battery charging. CD3217-compatible input. Schematic symbol on page 23.
Produces PP5V_S2 (5.15V) from PPBUS_AON. Vout=5.15V, F=1.5MHz, startup <15ms. Page 38.
Produces PP3V3_S2 (3.3V) from PPBUS_AON. Vout=3.12V, F=2.25MHz, startup <5ms. Page 39.
Produces PP3V3_AON from PP3V8_AON_VODMAN. 3.3V always-on LDO. Page 36.
Produces PP1V8_AON from PP3V8_AON_VODMAN. 1.8V always-on LDO. Page 36.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC0
ics.description: Port controller for ATC0 (left rear). PD negotiation, CC signaling, VBUS control. Internal LDO. SPI ROM for firmware.

ics.function: CD3217 USB-C PD port controller ATC1
ics.description: Port controller for ATC1 (left front). Same as UF400 for second port.

ics.function: TBT LS RX/TX level shifter (ATC0 I2C)
ics.description: Level shifter for ATC0 re-timer I2C and reset signals. Parrot 0 ICRESET level shifters.
eUSB LS BB DFPN level shifter for USB 2.0 signaling.
Parrot 0 I2C/reset level shifter. High side on PP3V_S2, low side on PP1V25_S2.
Parrot 1 I2C/reset level shifter.
Ceres SE (DK3219A). Powered by VDDPL1_SE, PP3V8_AON. I2C interface, SEP EEPROM at U0500 (STOCT).
SEP EEPROM IC. I2C interface. Connected to Ceres secure element.
TGA_PINDELAY_20X2_R9_2E_C5V. Connected to SoC.
TBT ROM BLANK. SPI serial flash for Thunderbolt firmware.
SoC SPI NOR flash. SOC_ROM_BLANK / SOC_ROM_BLANK_DRZL options.
SLGA... part. Controls display panel power rails. Page 68.
Secondary display power sequencer IC.
Display power control IC. Connects to PANEL_PWR_EN and BL_PWR_EN.
Boost converter for LCD backlight LED strings and keyboard backlight. SYMBOL 35000160. Input: PPBUS_AONSW_LCD. Page 69.
Integrated WiFi/BT module (LAMASURI18 STO). Powered by PP3V8_AON, PPBUS. 2GFEM + 5GFEM front-ends.
Monitors PP3V8_AON current via sense resistor. Used for current limit and fault detection.
Thunderbolt/USB4 Burnside Bridge retimer. 2x ICs (UF000, UF100). Critical module parts.
Second Burnside Bridge retimer IC.
Ace2 82 BGA USB-C/USB4 controller IC. ACE2_82_BGA.
3.3V LDO on USB-C High Speed ATC0 page. Provides filtered 3.3V for retimer.
